name: Refinery
description: Library component. Shared merge queue. Receives MergeReady from polecats, notifies MRs of processing and completion. Sequential: one MR at a time. Two-polecat/two-MR capacity.

MR_NOTIFY1.description: notifies MR 1 of processing and merge completion. Tagged 'Processing' or 'Merged'.

MR_NOTIFY2.description: notifies MR 2 of processing and merge completion. Tagged 'Processing' or 'Merged'.

actors.name: Refinery
actors.owner: Shared merge queue. Sequential processing. Receives MergeReady, notifies the relevant MR, processes, notifies merged, returns to idle.

triples.event: receives MergeReady from polecat1: claim MR1
notify MR1 it is being processed
MR1 merged: notify and return to idle
receives MergeReady from polecat2: claim MR2
notify MR2 it is being processed
MR2 merged: notify and return to idle
